headline: Bellew and Parsons Throw Punches Into Podcasting With 'Fight Your Corner'
lede: Boxing legend Tony Bellew is stepping out of the ring and into the media arena with a dynamic new podcast and show. Former champion meets veteran producer in a high-octane entertainment venture.
body:
Platform Media is set to launch a heavyweight new entertainment property that bridges sports commentary and compelling storytelling. 'Fight Your Corner' represents a strategic pivot for Bellew, who has successfully transitioned from professional boxing into media commentary.

The podcast and accompanying show will leverage Bellew's deep insider knowledge of boxing culture, promising audiences an unfiltered look into the sport's most gripping narratives. Parsons, a seasoned media producer, brings significant production expertise to transform raw athletic insights into sophisticated entertainment content.

Industry observers note the project arrives at a critical moment for sports-adjacent media programming. Streaming platforms and podcast networks have increasingly sought authentic voices with genuine athletic credentials to anchor documentary and conversational content.

Bellew's reputation as a charismatic, articulate former champion positions 'Fight Your Corner' to potentially disrupt traditional sports media formats. His previous media appearances demonstrate a natural storytelling ability that transcends typical athlete commentary.

While specific production details remain under wraps, the collaboration signals an exciting new direction for sports entertainment content. Platform Media appears committed to innovative storytelling that connects directly with passionate sports audiences.
key_facts: Tony Bellew: Former boxing champion turned media personality
Platform Media producing the new show/podcast
Launch expected in upcoming media season
